title: IIT Madras is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIT Madras is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIT Madras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Madras:
IIT Madras is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras!
